类 Module

java.lang.Object
com.zenith.module.api.ModuleUtils
com.zenith.module.api.Module
直接已知子类:
AbstractInventoryModule, ActionLimiter, ActiveHours, AntiAFK, AntiKick, AntiLeak, AutoArmor, AutoDisconnect, AutoDrop, AutoReconnect, AutoReply, AutoRespawn, ChatHistory, Click, CoordObfuscation, ExtraChat, QueueWarning, ReplayMod, Requeue, SessionTimeLimit, Spammer, SpawnPatrol, Spook, Tasks, VisualRange
public abstract class Module extends ModuleUtils
Module system base class.

  • 字段概要

    从类继承的字段 ModuleUtils

    moduleAlertPrefix, moduleLogPrefix

  • 构造器概要

    构造器

    说明
    Module()
     

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    void
    disable()
    Disables the module, does not check enabledSetting() or set any config values
    void
    enable()
    Enables the module, does not check enabledSetting() or set any config values
    abstract boolean
    enabledSetting()
    Whether this module should be enabled automatically on startup Typically, this should be read from a config boolean value
    @Nullable PacketHandlerCodec
    getClientPacketHandlerCodec()
     
    @Nullable PacketHandlerCodec
    getServerPacketHandlerCodec()
     
    boolean
    isEnabled()
     
    void
    onDisable()
    Override to run a custom hook when the module is disabled
    void
    onEnable()
    Override to run a custom hook when the module is enabled
    @Nullable PacketHandlerCodec
    registerClientPacketHandlerCodec()
    Override this to register client packet handlers Meaning packets between zenith and the destination server
    List<com.github.rfresh2.EventConsumer<?>>
    registerEvents()
    Override this to register module events
    @Nullable PacketHandlerCodec
    registerServerPacketHandlerCodec()
    Override this to register server packet handlers Meaning packets between zenith and players - both spectators and controlling player
    void
    setEnabled(boolean enabled)
    Sets the module enabled state, does not set any config values
    void
    subscribeEvents()
    Executed when the module is enabled Should not usually be overridden or run directly
    void
    syncEnabledFromConfig()
    Sets the module enabled state from the result of enabledSetting()
    void
    unsubscribeEvents()
    Executed when the module is disabled Should not usually be overridden or run directly

  • 方法详细资料

    • enabledSetting

      public abstract boolean enabledSetting()
      Whether this module should be enabled automatically on startup Typically, this should be read from a config boolean value

    • registerEvents

      public List<com.github.rfresh2.EventConsumer<?>> registerEvents()
      Override this to register module events

    • registerClientPacketHandlerCodec

      public @Nullable PacketHandlerCodec registerClientPacketHandlerCodec()
      Override this to register client packet handlers Meaning packets between zenith and the destination server

    • registerServerPacketHandlerCodec

      public @Nullable PacketHandlerCodec registerServerPacketHandlerCodec()
      Override this to register server packet handlers Meaning packets between zenith and players - both spectators and controlling player

    • onEnable

      public void onEnable()
      Override to run a custom hook when the module is enabled

    • onDisable

      public void onDisable()
      Override to run a custom hook when the module is disabled

    • enable

      public void enable()
      Enables the module, does not check enabledSetting() or set any config values

    • disable

      public void disable()
      Disables the module, does not check enabledSetting() or set any config values

    • setEnabled

      public void setEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Sets the module enabled state, does not set any config values

    • syncEnabledFromConfig

      public void syncEnabledFromConfig()
      Sets the module enabled state from the result of enabledSetting()

    • subscribeEvents

      public void subscribeEvents()
      Executed when the module is enabled Should not usually be overridden or run directly

    • unsubscribeEvents

      public void unsubscribeEvents()
      Executed when the module is disabled Should not usually be overridden or run directly
